title: Wasteland Survival
description: Survive the wasteland with powerful new gear, lethal monsters, and a full RPG leveling system!
body:
This mod is set in a tech-themed wasteland. It adds a wide variety of firearms, tools, and multifunctional armor, along with tech-based workstations and items to expand gameplay. Some existing enemies have been enhanced, while new foes demand different strategies to defeat.

A player leveling system has been introduced—gaining experience now strengthens specific abilities, making every point meaningful. Additionally, the mod introduces new biomes with deadly radiation, providing fresh challenges and a more immersive wasteland survival experience.

===========================================

本Mod以科技廢土風格為主。
新增不同種類槍械，工具和多功能裝甲，以及科技類工作台、物品等玩法。
部分敵人加強。新的敵人需要不同的應對方式。
引入玩家升級系統。升級後會加強某些能力。讓經驗不再是無用的數字。
引入新的生態環境。新生態有致命的輻射。
